mapper.sql: A.BATCH_SCHDUL_ID AS batchSchdulId , A.BATCH_OPERT_ID AS batchOpertId , A.EXECUT_CYCLE AS executCycle , A.EXECUT_SCHDUL_DE AS executSchdulDe , A.EXECUT_SCHDUL_HOUR AS executSchdulHour , A.EXECUT_SCHDUL_MNT AS executSchdulMnt , A.EXECUT_SCHDUL_SECND AS executSchdulSecnd , (SELECT O.BATCH_OPERT_NM FROM TB_BATCH_OPERT O WHERE O.BATCH_OPERT_ID = A.BATCH_OPERT_ID) AS batchOpertNm , (SELECT O.BATCH_PROGRM FROM TB_BATCH_OPERT O WHERE O.BATCH_OPERT_ID = A.BATCH_OPERT_ID) AS batchProgrm , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_BATCH_SCHDUL A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.BATCH_SCHDUL_ID LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BATCH_SCHDUL A WHERE 1=1
SELECT '' AS batchSchdulId FROM TB_BATCH_SCHDUL WHERE 1=0
SELECT '' AS batchSchdulId FROM TB_BATCH_SCHDUL WHERE 1=0
mapper.insert: UPDATE TB_BATCH_SCHDUL SET LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE 1=0
